## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content progress and address quality issues in LLM security articles.](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality challenges stem from SEO-driven research pulling in irrelevant competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [GrowthX is refining their research process to better focus on LLM security topics and persona](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Manual LLM checks and fact-checking are being implemented to ensure content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [promptfoo to review updated articles on application layer vulnerabilities and system prompt leakage](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### COVID-19 Experiences

  - [Kyle (GrowthX) currently has COVID-19, his first time getting it in 5 years](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Vivek (GrowthX) caught the first strain in Southeast Asia before it was widely known](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Vanessa (promptfoo) had COVID 1.5 years ago while traveling internationally, sick for 10 days](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Content Quality Challenges

  - [GrowthX facing issues with automated content generation for LLM security topics](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [SEO-driven research pulls in irrelevant competitor content, creating "content gaps"](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Manual edits required, leading to some inconsistencies slipping through](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [GrowthX working on refining the research process to focus on specific topics and personas](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Quality Assurance Measures

  - [Manually using LLMs to check content suitability and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Implemented fact-checking flow within article generation process](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Aiming to avoid fully manual writing to maintain scalability](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### Article Status Updates

  - [Application layer vulnerabilities: Edits incorporated, awaiting Vanessa's review](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

  - [Improper output handling: Access granted to promptfoo's CTO, awaiting confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Excessive agency: To be delivered by GrowthX within next day](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Unbounded consumption: Moved to "published" status (previously delivered)](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### GrowthX Team Expansion

  - [Close to adding several engineers to the team](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Aim to improve workflow adaptability and value delivery speed](https://fathom.video/share/QXxBDfyxsxy4Qt6nz9ydXx9YsRZUqWrb?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
